evidence_quotes.quote: The game is completely or partially reliant on a central server to function.
After an undisclosed amount of time the publisher shuts the server down, with no option for consumers to host their own or play peer-to-peer, rendering the game completely or partially unusable.

paragraphs.text: Hello! I wish for this initiative to include protection against the deactivation of software sold as a product. An example prevalent in the video games industry: A publisher releases a game and markets it as a product. The game is completely or partially reliant on a central server to function. After an undisclosed amount of time the publisher shuts the server down, with no option for consumers to host their own or play peer-to-peer, rendering the game completely or partially unusable. Regards.
